source_jobs.title: Opportunistic
source_jobs.description:
HI 👋 I’M AIDAN, FOUNDER OF MAPLE.

At Maple https://maple.inc, we’re building AI agents that work for restaurants. These agents answer calls, take orders, book appointments, and handle real customer interactions over natural voice.



But our bigger mission goes deeper: we’re building automated ontologies that model how businesses actually operate — their services, workflows, constraints, and language — so our agents can adapt to them instantly. We meet businesses where they are, not where software wants them to be.



We have many customers, strong revenue growth, years of runway, and backing from world-class investors. I’ll share more once we meet.




ABOUT THE ROLE


We are always hiring talented individuals for the many roles it takes to build our product and company. If you don't see an open role on the site, but are interested in joining our team, please submit your resume using the link below, and include a brief note highlighting why you feel you would be a great addition to Maple. Please note that our team is small and we can only respond to candidates that we see a potential role fit for.




HOW WE WORK

 - We optimize for leverage. That means great internal tooling, fast CI/CD, and code that scales across many customer types

 - We believe in deep ownership. Engineers here talk to users, design features, and ship fast

 - We value clarity over process. You’ll spend most of your day building, not waiting on decisions

 - We move in person. We’re a tight-knit team that moves fast and solves problems together




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive salary + meaningful equity

 - A real product with real usage and growing revenue

 - Strong In-person culture, fast feedback loops, and zero bureaucracy

 - A small team that feels like a founding team

 - Full health, dental, vision, 401k, life insurance, and unlimited PTO

 - Tools budget, coffee budget, whatever-you-need-to-be-great budget



Want to help reimagine how software works for real-world businesses? Let’s talk.

source_jobs.title: Product Designer
source_jobs.description:
HI 👋 I’M AIDAN, FOUNDER OF MAPLE.

At Maple https://maple.inc, we’re building AI agents that work for restaurants. These agents answer calls, take orders, book appointments, and handle real customer interactions over natural voice.



But our bigger mission goes deeper: we’re building automated ontologies that model how businesses actually operate — their services, workflows, constraints, and language — so our agents can adapt to them instantly. We meet businesses where they are, not where software wants them to be.



We have many customers, strong revenue growth, years of runway, and backing from world-class investors. I’ll share more once we meet.




ABOUT THE ROLE

At Maple, we’re looking for a Senior/Staff Product Designer ready to shape the future of AI-driven tools for local businesses. You’ll work side-by-side with engineers and founders, owning projects from first sketch to shipped product. If you love turning complex workflows into elegant, intuitive experiences—and have a sharp eye for quality—let’s talk.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Collaborate closely with engineering and product to drive roadmap projects from idea to launch—no assembly lines or hand-offs

 - Spot opportunities to refine our core UX and squash those pesky “paper cuts” that slow users down

 - Create crisp mockups, interactive prototypes, and high-fidelity visuals to bring ideas to life

 - Guide and inspire fellow designers through feedback and collaborative critique

 - Build and evolve our design system components for speed and consistency

 - Jump in on hiring to help us find the next great teammate




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 7+ years designing software products (bonus points for startup or SaaS experience)

 - Courage to ask big questions, experiment, and advocate for quality—even when it’s hard

 - Humility to accept feedback, iterate quickly, and pivot when needed

 - Deep experience prototyping in Figma (and bonus: AI, HTML/CSS, or other tools)

 - A knack for distilling problems and feedback into focused, user-friendly solutions

 - Strong written and verbal communication skills—async is our default, but you can riff live too




HOW WE WORK

 - We optimize for leverage. That means great internal tooling, fast CI/CD, and code that scales across many customer types

 - We believe in deep ownership. Engineers here talk to users, design features, and ship fast

 - We value clarity over process. You’ll spend most of your day building, not waiting on decisions

 - We move in person. We’re a tight-knit team that moves fast and solves problems together




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive salary + meaningful equity

 - A real product with real usage and growing revenue

 - Strong In-person culture, fast feedback loops, and zero bureaucracy

 - A small team that feels like a founding team

 - Full health, dental, vision, 401k, life insurance, and unlimited PTO

 - Tools budget, coffee budget, whatever-you-need-to-be-great budget



Want to help reimagine how software works for real-world businesses? Let’s talk.

source_jobs.title: Sales Development Representative
source_jobs.description:
HI 👋 I’M AIDAN, FOUNDER OF MAPLE.

At Maple https://maple.inc, we’re building AI agents that work for restaurants. These agents answer calls, take orders, book appointments, and handle real customer interactions over natural voice.



But our bigger mission goes deeper: we’re building automated ontologies that model how businesses actually operate — their services, workflows, constraints, and language — so our agents can adapt to them instantly. We meet businesses where they are, not where software wants them to be.



We have many customers, strong revenue growth, years of runway, and backing from world-class investors. I’ll share more once we meet.




ABOUT THE ROLE

At Maple, we’re on a mission to make AI work for real-world businesses—and we want a high-energy Business Development Representative who’s equal parts hunter, relationship-builder, and product enthusiast. You’ll be the first spark for new customers, showing them how Maple’s AI agents can revolutionize their day-to-day. If you love starting conversations, chasing leads, and moving fast, you’ll fit right in.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Find and engage potential customers—restaurants, salons, repair shops, you name it

 - Qualify inbound and outbound leads and set up intro calls for our sales team

 - Get to know Maple inside and out so you can tailor your pitch to every business

 - Build relationships with key decision-makers and make every interaction count

 - Work closely with product and customer success to share feedback and spot new opportunities

 - Help us level up our outreach strategies and keep our pipeline buzzing




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 0–2 years of experience in sales, business development, or just being scrappy and persistent

 - High energy, resourceful, and not afraid to cold call, DM, or try something new

 - Clear communicator who can make tech sound simple (and maybe even fun)

 - Comfortable juggling lots of conversations and priorities at once

 - Experience with small businesses or technical products is a plus, but not required

 - Organized, proactive, and always ready to go the extra mile to win the deal




HOW WE WORK

 - We optimize for leverage. That means great internal tooling, fast CI/CD, and code that scales across many customer types

 - We believe in deep ownership. Engineers here talk to users, design features, and ship fast

 - We value clarity over process. You’ll spend most of your day building, not waiting on decisions

 - We move in person. We’re a tight-knit team that moves fast and solves problems together




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive salary + meaningful equity

 - A real product with real usage and growing revenue

 - Strong In-person culture, fast feedback loops, and zero bureaucracy

 - A small team that feels like a founding team

 - Full health, dental, vision, 401k, life insurance, and unlimited PTO

 - Tools budget, coffee budget, whatever-you-need-to-be-great budget



Want to help reimagine how software works for real-world businesses? Let’s talk.

source_jobs.title: Design Engineer
source_jobs.description:
HI 👋 I’M AIDAN, FOUNDER OF MAPLE.

At Maple https://maple.inc, we’re building AI agents that work for restaurants. These agents answer calls, take orders, book appointments, and handle real customer interactions over natural voice.



But our bigger mission goes deeper: we’re building automated ontologies that model how businesses actually operate — their services, workflows, constraints, and language — so our agents can adapt to them instantly. We meet businesses where they are, not where software wants them to be.



We have many customers, strong revenue growth, years of runway, and backing from world-class investors. I’ll share more once we meet.




ABOUT THE ROLE

As a Design Engineer, you’ll be at the center of how we build products. You’ll own entire surfaces of the product: dashboards, config tools, real-time monitoring, internal ops UIs. You’ll prototype new ideas and bring structure to chaos, designing tools that scale across dozens of verticals with minimal friction.



We work in person, 5 days a week in our NYC office. Collaboration here is fast, noisy (in the best way), and high-trust. We move quickly, break things intentionally, and fix them just as fast.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Build product-facing and internal tools using TypeScript, React, and Tailwind

 - Design and implement intuitive ways for customers to manage AI agents and define business logic

 - Develop reusable components and own our emerging design system

 - Prototype new features, test them with customers, and ship fast

 - Help define our approach to UI architecture, scaling, and visual systems

 - Work closely with our founders, engineers, and customers

 - Contribute to a product culture that values clarity, speed, and leverage




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - Strong experience in React, TypeScript, CSS, and modern frontend workflows

 - Product taste: you know when something feels right and why

 - Systems thinking: you like building primitives, not one-offs

 - Experience designing and building tools, dashboards, and/or configuration UIs

 - Comfortable owning full features from wireframe to code

 - Bonus: experience with Figma, LLMs, conversational interfaces, or backend TypeScript

 - 4–8+ years experience preferred, but we’re flexible for the right person




HOW WE WORK

 - We optimize for leverage. That means great internal tooling, fast CI/CD, and code that scales across many customer types

 - We believe in deep ownership. Engineers here talk to users, design features, and ship fast

 - We value clarity over process. You’ll spend most of your day building, not waiting on decisions

 - We move in person. We’re a tight-knit team that moves fast and solves problems together




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive salary + meaningful equity

 - A real product with real usage and growing revenue

 - Strong In-person culture, fast feedback loops, and zero bureaucracy

 - A small team that feels like a founding team

 - Full health, dental, vision, 401k, life insurance, and unlimited PTO

 - Tools budget, coffee budget, whatever-you-need-to-be-great budget



Want to help reimagine how software works for real-world businesses? Let’s talk.

source_jobs.title: Full Stack Engineer
source_jobs.description:
HI 👋 I’M AIDAN, FOUNDER OF MAPLE.

At Maple https://maple.inc, we’re building AI agents that work for restaurants. These agents answer calls, take orders, book appointments, and handle real customer interactions over natural voice.



But our bigger mission goes deeper: we’re building automated ontologies that model how businesses actually operate — their services, workflows, constraints, and language — so our agents can adapt to them instantly. We meet businesses where they are, not where software wants them to be.



We have many customers, strong revenue growth, years of runway, and backing from world-class investors. I’ll share more once we meet.




ABOUT THE ROLE

As a Full Stack Engineer, you’ll work across our entire stack, from real-time voice interactions to operational tooling and backend logic. You’ll help us build and scale the systems that power AI agents in the wild, working closely with product, infra, and design to deliver real value, fast.



You’ll own features from end to end, touch everything from UIs to APIs, and help shape our internal architecture as we grow. You’ll be helping define how software represents real-world business logic at scale.



We work in person, 5 days a week in our NYC office. Collaboration here is fast, noisy (in the best way), and high-trust. We move quickly, break things intentionally, and fix them just as fast.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Build and maintain full-stack features across our TypeScript monorepo

 - Work across frontend (React + Tailwind) and backend (Node.js + Postgres) systems

 - Build internal tooling, customer dashboards, and agent management interfaces

 - Design APIs and data models that reflect real-world workflows and logic

 - Collaborate closely with design and product to simplify complex problems

 - Help scale and harden core infrastructure as usage grows

 - Own projects end to end — from user need to shipped product




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - Strong experience with TypeScript across both frontend and backend

 - Fluency with React, CSS, modern component libraries, and design systems

 - Experience designing and building APIs and data flows

 - A product mindset: you care about speed, clarity, and usability

 - Excitement about AI systems, voice interfaces, or modeling real-world logic

 - Bonus: experience with Postgres, LLMs, Twilio, Sync Engines, or WebSockets

 - 4–8+ years experience preferred, but we’re flexible for the right person




HOW WE WORK

 - We optimize for leverage. That means great internal tooling, fast CI/CD, and code that scales across many customer types

 - We believe in deep ownership. Engineers here talk to users, design features, and ship fast

 - We value clarity over process. You’ll spend most of your day building, not waiting on decisions

 - We move in person. We’re a tight-knit team that moves fast and solves problems together




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive salary + meaningful equity

 - A real product with real usage and growing revenue

 - Strong In-person culture, fast feedback loops, and zero bureaucracy

 - A small team that feels like a founding team

 - Full health, dental, vision, 401k, life insurance, and unlimited PTO

 - Tools budget, coffee budget, whatever-you-need-to-be-great budget



Want to help reimagine how software works for real-world businesses? Let’s talk.

source_jobs.title: ML Research Engineer
source_jobs.description:
HI 👋 I’M AIDAN, FOUNDER OF MAPLE.

At Maple https://maple.inc, we’re building AI agents that work for restaurants. These agents answer calls, take orders, book appointments, and handle real customer interactions over natural voice.



But our bigger mission goes deeper: we’re building automated ontologies that model how businesses actually operate — their services, workflows, constraints, and language — so our agents can adapt to them instantly. We meet businesses where they are, not where software wants them to be.



We have many customers, strong revenue growth, years of runway, and backing from world-class investors. I’ll share more once we meet.




ABOUT THE ROLE

As an ML Research Engineer at Maple, you'll be a part of our core product team transforming cutting-edge research into production-ready voice agents, serving millions of interactions for local businesses. Collaborate with experts from Google Brain, Two Sigma, Stanford, MIT, Columbia, and IBM, rapidly deploying advanced models and systems that directly impact small businesses.

We work in person, 5 days a week in our NYC office. Collaboration here is fast, noisy (in the best way), and high-trust. We move quickly, break things intentionally, and fix them just as fast.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Optimize speech recognition (ASR), large language models (LLMs), and text-to-speech (TTS) for real-world use, ensuring accuracy in diverse, noisy environments.

 - Fine-tune LLMs with retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), reinforcement learning (RL), and prompt engineering for dynamic, context-aware conversations.

 - Integrate AI components into autonomous agents capable of complex tasks like scheduling, order-taking, and issue resolution.

 - Create human-in-the-loop and automated systems to monitor performance, detect anomalies, and continuously improve models from real-world feedback.

 - Develop pipelines to construct knowledge graphs from business data, powering adaptive AI interactions.

 - Work with infrastructure teams to scale models efficiently across GPU/TPU clusters and edge devices, minimizing latency.

 - Manage rapid experimentation, training, and highly optimized production inference.

 - Lead evaluations, error analysis, and iterative improvements to maintain robustness and scalability.

 - Balance research innovation with practical usability by closely working with product and customer teams.

 - Publish research, contribute to open-source, and present at industry-leading conferences.




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - 3-7+ years deploying impactful ML models, ideally in voice, NLP, knowledge graphs, or agent systems.

 - Deep knowledge in speech recognition, language models, RL/dialogue systems, TTS, ontology systems, or agent orchestration.

 - Proficiency in PyTorch or JAX; optimization experience with CUDA/Triton preferred.

 - Proven ability to minimize latency and resource use on GPUs/TPUs or edge hardware.

 - Strong data-driven approach with measurable improvements.

 - Passion for creating intuitive, helpful, and frustration-free AI experiences.

 - BS, MS, or PhD in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Mathematics, or equivalent practical expertise.




HOW WE WORK

 - We optimize for leverage. That means great internal tooling, fast CI/CD, and code that scales across many customer types

 - We believe in deep ownership. Engineers here talk to users, design features, and ship fast

 - We value clarity over process. You’ll spend most of your day building, not waiting on decisions

 - We move in person. We’re a tight-knit team that moves fast and solves problems together




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive salary + meaningful equity

 - A real product with real usage and growing revenue

 - Strong In-person culture, fast feedback loops, and zero bureaucracy

 - A small team that feels like a founding team

 - Full health, dental, vision, 401k, life insurance, and unlimited PTO

 - Tools budget, coffee budget, whatever-you-need-to-be-great budget

source_jobs.title: GTM Engineer
source_jobs.description:
HI 👋 I’M AIDAN, FOUNDER OF MAPLE.

At Maple https://maple.inc, we’re building AI agents that work for restaurants. These agents answer calls, take orders, book appointments, and handle real customer interactions over natural voice.



But our bigger mission goes deeper: we’re building automated ontologies that model how businesses actually operate — their services, workflows, constraints, and language — so our agents can adapt to them instantly. We meet businesses where they are, not where software wants them to be.



We have many customers, strong revenue growth, years of runway, and backing from world-class investors. I’ll share more once we meet.




ABOUT THE ROLE

You will own the revenue-generating systems at Maple end-to-end. That means the pipes that feed leads in, the tools reps use to close them, the experiments we run to figure out what works, and the plumbing that tells us whether any of it is actually moving the business. Some of this is plumbing. Some of it is experimentation. Some of it is product-adjacent rep-facing tooling. All of it is high-leverage, and all of it is measurable.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Build and automate pipelines that close loops from the top of the funnel for any channel to closed-won revenue.

 - A rep tooling layer that makes a Maple AE genuinely faster than an AE at any other company.

 - Work with sales, marketing, and ops to solve bottlenecks and unlock growth

 - Keep our data clean and systems running smoothly

 - Prototype, test, and roll out new tools and automations

 - Whatever other system needs to exist six months from now that neither of us has thought of yet. You'll find them. That's half the job.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 1–3 years in a technical, ops, or growth role

 - Gets excited by the business problem underneath the engineering problem.

 - Has a reasonable amount of context on, or genuine curiosity about, how modern GTM actually works. You've at least heard of cold outbound, attribution, PLG, partner channels, SDR motions.

 - Operates with zero hand-holding. You don't ask "what should I build next", you show up with three options and an opinion on which is right.

 - Writes code that ships, not code that architects. When you see a problem, your instinct is to build the scrappy 40% solution, measure it, and iterate and not to design the perfect system first.

 - Uses modern tools (Claude, Cursor, Linear, whatever) fluently and without shame.

 - If you're not sure whether you're qualified, apply anyway — we hire on trajectory and wiring, not pedigree.




HOW WE WORK

 - We optimize for leverage. That means great internal tooling, fast CI/CD, and code that scales across many customer types

 - We believe in deep ownership. Engineers here talk to users, design features, and ship fast

 - We value clarity over process. You’ll spend most of your day building, not waiting on decisions

 - We move in person. We’re a tight-knit team that moves fast and solves problems together




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive salary + meaningful equity

 - A real product with real usage and growing revenue

 - Strong In-person culture, fast feedback loops, and zero bureaucracy

 - A small team that feels like a founding team

 - Full health, dental, vision, 401k, life insurance, and unlimited PTO

 - Tools budget, coffee budget, whatever-you-need-to-be-great budget



Want to help reimagine how software works for real-world businesses? Let’s talk.

source_jobs.title: SMB Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
HI 👋 I’M AIDAN, FOUNDER OF MAPLE.

At Maple https://maple.inc, we’re building AI agents that work for restaurants. These agents answer calls, take orders, book appointments, and handle real customer interactions over natural voice.



But our bigger mission goes deeper: we’re building automated ontologies that model how businesses actually operate — their services, workflows, constraints, and language — so our agents can adapt to them instantly. We meet businesses where they are, not where software wants them to be.



We have many customers, strong revenue growth, years of runway, and backing from world-class investors. I’ll share more once we meet.



About the Role

We’re looking for a high-energy SMB Account Executive to help bring Maple to thousands of local businesses across the country. This is a pure closing role—no prospecting required. Our growth marketing team delivers a steady flow of warm, high-intent leads, and your job is to help business owners quickly understand the value of Maple and confidently move forward.

You’ll run a high-velocity sales motion, speaking with dozens of business owners each week and closing 7–15 new locations per week. If you love fast feedback loops, frequent wins, and selling a product that genuinely helps customers on day one, this role is for you.

Early Account Executives will help define how SMB sales works at Maple and will have meaningful influence on process, tooling, and playbooks as we scale.



What You’ll Do

 - Close 7–15 new SMB customers per week through inbound and marketing-qualified leads (no prospecting required)

 - Run fast, consultative sales calls with local business owners across many industries

 - Clearly explain Maple’s value and guide customers to the right plan for their business

 - Maintain tight follow-up loops to move deals from first call to close quickly

 - Collaborate closely with growth, onboarding, and product teams to improve conversion and activation

 - Continuously refine sales scripts, objection handling, and demos as we scale

 - Provide direct feedback from the field to help shape messaging and product decisions



What We’re Looking For

 - We want people who are energized by big goals; we're racing towards 40,000 customers and $100m in revenue by the end of 2027

 - Someone excited to be part of a once-in-a-lifetime technological shift (AI is eating the world)

 - 1–4+ years of experience in SMB sales, inside sales, or high-volume closing roles (SaaS preferred but not required)

 - Comfortable running many calls per day and thriving in a fast-paced environment

 - Strong communicator who can make complex ideas feel simple and obvious

 - Competitive, resilient, and motivated by clear goals and frequent wins

 - Organized and process-oriented, but adaptable as things evolve quickly

 - Excited to help build and refine a sales motion that scales to tens of thousands of customers



Don’t Apply Here If...

Please don’t apply if you aren’t excited about the following:

 - Working ~70 hrs/week, in-person, with some of the most ambitious and intelligent people in NYC

 - Dealing with the growing pains of a hyper-scaling company — ambiguity, rapid change, and constant iteration.

 - Building a generational company at the center of a once-in-a-lifetime technological inflection.

 - Experimenting often, cutting losses quickly, and shipping fast. The faster and more things we try, the faster we all grow.




HOW WE WORK

 - We optimize for leverage. That means great internal tooling, fast CI/CD, and code that scales across many customer types

 - We believe in deep ownership. Engineers here talk to users, design features, and ship fast

 - We value clarity over process. You’ll spend most of your day building, not waiting on decisions

 - We move in person. We’re a tight-knit team that moves fast and solves problems together




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive salary + meaningful equity

 - A real product with real usage and growing revenue

 - Strong I

source_jobs.title: Customer Support Representative (LatAm, Remote)
source_jobs.description:
HI 👋 I’M AIDAN, FOUNDER OF MAPLE.

At Maple https://maple.inc, we’re building AI agents that work for restaurants. These agents answer calls, take orders, book appointments, and handle real customer interactions over natural voice.



But our bigger mission goes deeper: we’re building automated ontologies that model how businesses actually operate — their services, workflows, constraints, and language — so our agents can adapt to them instantly. We meet businesses where they are, not where software wants them to be.



We have many customers, strong revenue growth, years of runway, and backing from world-class investors. I’ll share more once we meet.




WHY THIS ROLE EXISTS

When a business signs with Maple, two things must happen:

 1. They must get live quickly.

 2. They must feel like we have their back.

This role sits at the intersection of onboarding and support. You will:

 - Guide new customers through setup

 - Handle live support when issues arise

 - Think quickly when edge cases happen

 - Communicate calmly when a restaurant owner has questions

 - Escalate to engineering clearly and precisely and implement solutions

We need someone who:

 - Thinks on their feet

 - Enjoys talking to business owners

 - Can gather context fast

 - Is comfortable with ambiguity

 - Takes ownership instead of waiting




WHAT YOU’LL DO


ONBOARDING

 - Run onboarding calls with new customers

 - Translate business operations into structured AI configurations

 - Identify gaps or unclear workflows and clarify them live

 - Ensure customers go live quickly and confidently


SUPPORT

 - Handle inbound support calls, texts, and emails

 - Troubleshoot real-time voice agent issues

 - Think creatively when things don’t follow the script

 - Gather complete context before escalating to engineering

 - Own issues end-to-end


SYSTEMS + FEEDBACK

 - Document cases clearly in Salesforce

 - Communicate tightly in Slack

 - Identify recurring friction points

 - Suggest improvements to tooling, onboarding flow, or documentation




WHO YOU ARE


OWNERSHIP MENTALITY

You think like an operator. You take initiative, care about outcomes, and feel energized by solving real problems.




RESPONSIVENESS

You operate with urgency and reliability. When something needs attention, you step in quickly and keep it moving.




GROWTH-MINDED

You enjoy learning, improving, and quickly implementing feedback.




JOB REQUIREMENTS

 - Fluency in English (C1/C2), with strong written and verbal communication skills in both languages

 - 2–5+ years in customer support, onboarding, or high-touch SaaS roles

 - Experience handling escalations and complex customer issues with professionalism, empathy, and sound judgment

 - Strong conversational ability (moderately extroverted, not robotic)

 - Quick thinker — you don’t default to “let me check on that”

 - Comfortable handling ambiguous or messy situations

 - Ability to stay calm, respectful, and solution-oriented in time-sensitive or high-pressure situations

 - Able to gather context when customers provide incomplete information

 - Strong organizational skills with the ability to prioritize effectively, manage multiple active cases simultaneously, and maintain accuracy under pressure


BONUS IF YOU:

 - Have worked with SMBs or local businesses

 - Have experience with Intercom, OpenPhone, Salesforce

 - Have supported technical products

 - Thrive in early-stage startup environments







HOW WE WORK

 - We optimize for leverage. That means great internal tooling, fast CI/CD, and code that scales across many customer types

 - We believe in deep ownership. Engineers here talk to users, design features, and ship fast

 - We value clarity over process. You’ll spend most of your day building, not waiting on decisions

 - We move in person. We’re a tight-knit team that moves fast and solves problems together




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive salary + meaningful equity

 - A real product with real usage and gr

source_jobs.title: Forward Deployed Engineer - Growth
source_jobs.description:
HI 👋 I’M AIDAN, FOUNDER OF MAPLE.

At Maple https://maple.inc, we’re building AI agents that work for restaurants. These agents answer calls, take orders, book appointments, and handle real customer interactions over natural voice.



But our bigger mission goes deeper: we’re building automated ontologies that model how businesses actually operate — their services, workflows, constraints, and language — so our agents can adapt to them instantly. We meet businesses where they are, not where software wants them to be.



We have many customers, strong revenue growth, years of runway, and backing from world-class investors. I’ll share more once we meet.




ABOUT THE ROLE

You will own the revenue-generating systems at Maple end-to-end. That means the pipes that feed leads in, the tools reps use to close them, the experiments we run to figure out what works, and the plumbing that tells us whether any of it is actually moving the business. Some of this is plumbing. Some of it is experimentation. Some of it is product-adjacent rep-facing tooling. All of it is high-leverage, and all of it is measurable.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Build and automate pipelines that close loops from the top of the funnel for any channel to closed-won revenue.

 - A rep tooling layer that makes a Maple AE genuinely faster than an AE at any other company.

 - Work with sales, marketing, and ops to solve bottlenecks and unlock growth

 - Keep our data clean and systems running smoothly

 - Prototype, test, and roll out new tools and automations

 - Whatever other system needs to exist six months from now that neither of us has thought of yet. You'll find them. That's half the job.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 1–3 years in a technical, ops, or growth role

 - Gets excited by the business problem underneath the engineering problem.

 - Has a reasonable amount of context on, or genuine curiosity about, how modern GTM actually works. You've at least heard of cold outbound, attribution, PLG, partner channels, SDR motions.

 - Operates with zero hand-holding. You don't ask "what should I build next", you show up with three options and an opinion on which is right.

 - Writes code that ships, not code that architects. When you see a problem, your instinct is to build the scrappy 40% solution, measure it, and iterate and not to design the perfect system first.

 - Uses modern tools (Claude, Cursor, Linear, whatever) fluently and without shame.

 - If you're not sure whether you're qualified, apply anyway — we hire on trajectory and wiring, not pedigree.




HOW WE WORK

 - We optimize for leverage. That means great internal tooling, fast CI/CD, and code that scales across many customer types

 - We believe in deep ownership. Engineers here talk to users, design features, and ship fast

 - We value clarity over process. You’ll spend most of your day building, not waiting on decisions

 - We move in person. We’re a tight-knit team that moves fast and solves problems together




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive salary + meaningful equity

 - A real product with real usage and growing revenue

 - Strong In-person culture, fast feedback loops, and zero bureaucracy

 - A small team that feels like a founding team

 - Full health, dental, vision, 401k, life insurance, and unlimited PTO

 - Tools budget, coffee budget, whatever-you-need-to-be-great budget



Want to help reimagine how software works for real-world businesses? Let’s talk.

source_jobs.title: Special Projects Lead
source_jobs.description:
HI 👋 I’M AIDAN, FOUNDER OF MAPLE.

At Maple https://maple.inc, we’re building AI agents that work for restaurants. These agents answer calls, take orders, book appointments, and handle real customer interactions over natural voice.



But our bigger mission goes deeper: we’re building automated ontologies that model how businesses actually operate — their services, workflows, constraints, and language — so our agents can adapt to them instantly. We meet businesses where they are, not where software wants them to be.



We have many customers, strong revenue growth, years of runway, and backing from world-class investors. I’ll share more once we meet.




SPECIAL PROJECTS LEAD (ROTATIONAL PROGRAM)

 
 


ABOUT THE ROLE

The Special Projects Lead role is designed as a rotational program, giving you the chance to contribute to different parts of the company - including pre-sale, post-sale, product, and operations. This is an opportunity to learn the business from multiple angles, build relationships across teams, and make an impact where it matters most. You'll work on a range of short- and medium-term projects, supporting key priorities while developing your skills and experience across functions.

 
 


WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Rotate through core areas of Maple, including sales, customer success, product, and operations

 - Support projects that may include process improvements, new initiative pilots, or helping teams work more efficiently

 - Partner with different teams to learn best practices and help address immediate business needs

 - Build strong cross-functional relationships and gain exposure to a variety of challenges and solutions

 - Work closely with mentors and team leads to develop your skills and identify areas of growth

 - Share insights and suggest improvements as you learn across your rotations

 
 


WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - Any level of experience is welcome - including new grads, early-career professionals, or those seeking a career shift

 - Interest in learning how a high-growth company operates across different teams

 - Collaborative mindset - you enjoy working with others and learning from them

 - Willingness to take on new challenges and adapt to different environments

 - Organized, communicative, and eager to share your perspective

 - Self-motivated and curious, with a drive to contribute wherever you land

 
 


WHY MAPLE?

 - Unique opportunity to learn, grow, and make an impact across multiple company functions

 - Supportive team environment that values learning and collaboration

 - Ability to shape your own experience and explore potential long-term roles within Maple

 - Competitive salary, benefits, and meaningful equity

 

If you’re ready to try new things, work with different teams, and help Maple grow, we encourage you to apply.




HOW WE WORK

 - We optimize for leverage. That means great internal tooling, fast CI/CD, and code that scales across many customer types

 - We believe in deep ownership. Engineers here talk to users, design features, and ship fast

 - We value clarity over process. You’ll spend most of your day building, not waiting on decisions

 - We move in person. We’re a tight-knit team that moves fast and solves problems together




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive salary + meaningful equity

 - A real product with real usage and growing revenue

 - Strong In-person culture, fast feedback loops, and zero bureaucracy

 - A small team that feels like a founding team

 - Full health, dental, vision, 401k, life insurance, and unlimited PTO

 - Tools budget, coffee budget, whatever-you-need-to-be-great budget



Want to help reimagine how software works for real-world businesses? Let’s talk.

source_jobs.title: Growth Associate
source_jobs.description:
HI 👋 I’M AIDAN, FOUNDER OF MAPLE.

At Maple https://maple.inc, we’re building AI agents that work for restaurants. These agents answer calls, take orders, book appointments, and handle real customer interactions over natural voice.



But our bigger mission goes deeper: we’re building automated ontologies that model how businesses actually operate — their services, workflows, constraints, and language — so our agents can adapt to them instantly. We meet businesses where they are, not where software wants them to be.



We have many customers, strong revenue growth, years of runway, and backing from world-class investors. I’ll share more once we meet.




GROWTH ASSOCIATE

 


ABOUT THE ROLE

 

The Growth Associate role is designed as a rotational program, providing you with the opportunity to contribute to different parts of Maple’s revenue engine - including pre-sale, post-sale, product, and operations. This role is your chance to gain hands-on experience driving business growth, understanding key revenue levers, and helping scale Maple’s impact across teams. You’ll work on a variety of high-priority projects that support sales, customer retention, and process efficiency - developing your skills while making a measurable impact on our bottom line.

 


WHAT YOU’LL DO

 

 - Rotate through core areas at Maple: sales, customer success, product, and operations—with a focus on identifying and executing on growth opportunities

 - Support projects related to revenue growth: process improvements, new initiative pilots, and helping teams operate more efficiently

 - Partner with teams to identify best practices and address immediate business needs tied to revenue generation and retention

 - Build strong cross-functional relationships and gain exposure to the challenges and solutions for driving business results

 - Work closely with mentors and team leads to develop skills that have a direct growth impact

 - Share insights, propose improvements, and help execute on strategies that drive revenue and customer success

 


WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 

 - Any level of experience is welcome - including new grads, early-career professionals, or those seeking a career shift

 - Interest in learning how a high-growth company drives revenue across multiple go-to-market teams

 - Collaborative mindset - you enjoy working with others, learning from them, and driving team-based results

 - Willingness to take on new challenges and adapt to fast-paced environments

 - Organized and communicative, with a focus on growth and data-driven impact

 - Self-motivated, curious, and driven to contribute to Maple’s growth and success

 


WHY MAPLE?

 

 - Unique opportunity to build your skills and make an impact across the entire growth and revenue function

 - Supportive team environment that values experimentation and results

 - Ability to shape your experience and explore long-term roles in growth, sales, and more

 - Competitive salary, benefits, and meaningful equity

 

If you’re ready to help accelerate Maple’s growth, work with high-impact teams, and be part of our journey, we encourage you to apply.




HOW WE WORK

 - We optimize for leverage. That means great internal tooling, fast CI/CD, and code that scales across many customer types

 - We believe in deep ownership. Engineers here talk to users, design features, and ship fast

 - We value clarity over process. You’ll spend most of your day building, not waiting on decisions

 - We move in person. We’re a tight-knit team that moves fast and solves problems together

 - A small team that feels like a founding team

 - Full health, dental, vision, 401k, life insurance, and unlimited PTO
